title: Jumbo, Disney Pix Collection - Frozen 2, Disney Jigsaw Puzzles for Adults, 1,000 piece
features: A magical collection of images from the enchanting Pixar sequel, Frozen 2
The jigsaw puzzle has been produced using high-quality recycled board
description: Product Description This 1,000-piece puzzle features snapshots of all your favourite characters from the beloved Pixar sequel, Frozen 2. Elsa, Anna, Olaf, Kristoff and Sven are all here to join in the fun, with charming snapshots that bring this exciting puzzle to life. The finished 1000 piece puzzle measures 68 x 49cm when complete and has been produced using high-quality recycled board to ensure that every piece of the puzzle maintains its original shape time and time again so you can enjoy this for a long time. Safety Warning Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
